name: aion-forge-skills
description: AION-FORGE Codex skill pack for evidence-grounded innovation workflows.
author: DinhLucent

scripts.check: npm run check:node && npm run check:format && npm run check:python && npm run check:bash && npm run validate:skills && npm run test:local
scripts.check:node: node --check bin/aion-forge-skills.js && node --check scripts/validate-skills.js && node --check scripts/check-format.js && node --check scripts/check-bash-syntax.js && node --check scripts/run-local-benchmarks.js && node --check scripts/clean-python-cache.js && node --check evals/run_codex_skill_evals.mjs && node --check evals/run_subagent_matrix.mjs
scripts.check:python: python -m py_compile skills/aion-evaluation-harness/scripts/evaluate_innovation_json.py skills/aion-forge/scripts/evaluate_innovation_json.py && node scripts/clean-python-cache.js && python scripts/check_python_syntax.py
scripts.test:local: npm run test:evaluator && npm run test:subagents && npm run test:json && npm run test:cli && npm run test:install && npm run test:package
